settings.label: Start
settings.title: First-use guide
settings.text: A gentle introduction to charging, cleaning, choosing settings, and storing products privately.

settings.label: Care
settings.title: Cleaning and storage
settings.text: Simple habits that keep products fresh, comfortable, and ready for the next ritual.

settings.label: Comfort
settings.title: Finding your settings
settings.text: How to start low, move slowly, and make the experience feel personal without pressure.

settings.title: Charge fully before first use
settings.text: Use the included cable or base until the indicator confirms a full charge.

settings.title: Clean before and after use
settings.text: Use warm water where appropriate, a gentle compatible cleanser, and allow products to dry fully before storage.

settings.title: Start with the gentlest setting
settings.text: Move slowly through modes and pressure levels so the product feels like part of your rhythm.

settings.title: Store separately
settings.text: Keep products in their pouch or case, away from lint, sharp objects, and direct heat.

settings.heading: A calm guide to care, comfort, and confidence.
settings.text: Simple, respectful guidance for using Libersens products safely, privately, and with ease.
settings.grid_heading: Helpful pages for the questions customers naturally ask.
settings.panel_heading: Make the first experience feel easy.
settings.panel_text: The user guide page follows the reference site's practical support structure: clear guide cards followed by actionable steps. You can later expand this into FAQ, care charts, and product-specific instructions.
